creator: lupe@lupe-christoph.de
text:
Hi!

There are mainly four differences between this patch and mine:
- Lin's patch changed to fixed UID/GID
- mine converted to WWWDIR
- mine corrected the location of BASH
- I neglected to update files/patch-Makefile because the old one still
  works.

I still debate the necessity to use a scarce resource like a UID and a
GID for this port.

Lupe Christopg
-- 
| Insanity is catching.                                                  |
| Terry Pratchett, "Making Money"                                        |
